tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible prediabetes/diabetes, despite normal fasting glucose. Creatinine is slightly below the reference range, which may be due to low muscle mass and is not typically concerning in elderly females. All other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glycemic control.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
